title: MCLN EX54 – Leave Different Quantity for Replens & Radial Putaway Remaining Configuration Guide 1
fullText:

GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup PAGEREF _Toc183615342 \h 3 1.1 Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc183615343 \h 3 2. ADD ADDITIONAL CUSTOM CODES PAGEREF _Toc183615344 \h 6 2.1 C-000-EX54 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc183615345 \h 6 3. ADD TRANSACTION PARAMETERS PAGEREF _Toc183615346 \h 7 3.1 EX54 Fill Casepk-SYS Param 504-504 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc183615347 \h 7 3.2 EX54 Fill Casepk-SYS Param 505-520 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc183615348 \h 8 3.3 EX54 Fill Casepk-SYS Param 20-34 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc183615349 \h 9 3.4 EX54 Pull ILPN Param 504-504 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc183615350 \h 10 3.5 EX54 Ptwy USER DIR Transaction link name PAGEREF _Toc183615351 \h 12 3.6 EX54 Fill Casepk-SYS PARAM 522-522 ENABLEMENT PAGEREF _Toc183615352 \h 12 3.7 EX54 FILL CASEPKRNB-SYS Transaction parameter PAGEREF _Toc183615353 \h 14 3.8 EX54 FILL Actv-SYS PARAM 523-523 ENABLEMENT PAGEREF _Toc183615354 \h 15 4. EX54 Error Messages PAGEREF _Toc183615355 \h 17 4.1 Custom ERROR MESSAGES PAGEREF _Toc183615356 \h 17 5. EX54 Additional Task Creation Rules PAGEREF _Toc183615357 \h 17 5.1 REPLEN for Repl Case 50 PAGEREF _Toc183615358 \h 17 1. GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- 000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. 2. ADD ADDITIONAL CUSTOM CODES 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000- EX 54 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. 2.1 C-000-EX 54 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. 3. ADD TRANSACTION PARAMETER S EX54 Fill Casepk-SYS Param 504-504 Enablement Navigate to Transaction Parameter s in WM. Then filter by Transaction Name “ Fill Case Pk ” to search . We will need to add param byte 50 4 -50 4 if it has not been added. Select Transaction Name Fill CasePk-SysD and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Click the Program Template Button Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. Select Transaction Name and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Click the edit button Check the box to enable EX 54 custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. EX 54 Fill Casepk-SYS Param 505-520 Enablement Navigate to Transaction Parameters in WM. Then filter by Transaction Name “Fill Case Pk” to search. We will need to add param byte 50 5 -5 20 if it has not been added. This will be done to all Fill Transactions that will utilize EX54. Select Transaction Name Fill CasePk-SysD and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Click the Program Template Button Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. Select Transaction Name and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Click the edit button Add parameter values “PTWYUSERDR” to enable EX 54 custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. EX54 Fill Casepk-SYS Param 20-34 Enablement Navigate to Transaction Parameters in WM. Then filter by Transaction Name “Fill CasePK” to search. We will need to add param byte 20-34 if it has not been added. Select Transaction Name and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Click the Program Template Button Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. Select Transaction Name and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Click the edit button Check the box to enable EX54 custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. EX54 Pull ILPN Param 504-504 Enablement Navigate to Transaction Parameters in WM. Then filter by Transaction Name “Pull iLPN” to search. We will need to add param byte 504-504 if it has not been added. Select Transaction Name Pull iLPN and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Click the Program Template Button Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. Select Transaction Name Pull iLPN and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Click the edit button Add parameter values “LPNDisp-Ptwy” to enable EX54 custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. EX54 Ptwy USER DIR Transaction link name Navigate to Transaction Parameters in WM. Then filter by Transaction Name “ptwy*” to search. We will need to add transaction link name “PTWYUSERDR” if it has not been added. Select Transaction Name PTWY USER DIR and then click on the details tab to showcase the transaction details Populate the transaction link name with the information provided in the screenshot below . Click SAVE to enable EX54 custom functionality. EX54 Fill Casepk-SYS P ARAM 522-522 ENABLEMENT Navigate to Transaction Parameters in WM. Then filter by Transaction Name “Fill Case Pk” to search. We will need to add param byte 5 22 -5 22 if it has not been added. Select Transaction Name Fill CasePk-SysD and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Click the Program Template Button Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. Click SAVE. Select Transaction Name and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Click the edit button Check the box to enable EX54 custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. And repeat for transaction Fill Active Sys Dir EX54 FILL CASEPKRNB-SYS Transaction parameter 1. Navigate to Transaction Parameters in WM. Then filter by Transaction Name “Fill Case Pk” to search. Then click on ‘COPY ’ Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. Select Transaction Name Fill CasePkRNB-SysD and then click on the parameters tab to display parameters. Set Trans Param 3-3 Item Verification Mode = “Item is displayed, user key qty” Set Trans Param 522-522 Ilpn Location retention to ‘Y’ and enable EX54 . Open Task Action UI and filter by INT type 9 then find Replen CP-Rainbow. We will need to change program name to Fill CasePkRNB-SysD if it has not been added. EX54 FILL A ctv -S ys Dir PARAM 52 3 -52 3 ENABLEMENT Select Save Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI Filter for Fill Actv Sys Dir transaction Select Program Template on the bottom right Select Add Enter details below Select Save Navigate back to Fill Actv Sys Dir transaction Select Edit Enable parameter 523-523 Select Save 4. EX 54 Error Messages   4.1 Custom ERROR MESSAGES     Navigate to the Messages UI then click on the Message Master Tab    Select ‘+’ in the upper right-hand side of screen.    Add values below if not already added.       Save.    5. EX54 Additional Task Creation Rules   REPLEN for Repl Case 50 Navigate to the Task Creation Rules UI then select the REPL -PTL Replenishment Task Criteria Tab and hit view in the bottom right-hand side of the screen Select ‘add’ in the bottom left-hand side of screen.    Add values below if not already added for Replenish CP50.       Save.
